creator: rsmith@xs4all.nl
text:
(In reply to Antoine Brodin from comment #11)

Thanks! That did the trick.

But now 'make check-orphans' complains. :-(

> make check-orphans
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/f2py-%%PYTHON_VER%%.1.gz
Error: Orphaned: man/man1/f2py.1.gz
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1
Stop.

Not sure what has to be done here.

Does the manpage have to be manually added to ${TMPPLIST} in the post-install target, just like the manpage itself is manually installed and linked?
